Petition For Authority To Enter Into Contingent Fee Agreement
Off Calendar Oct-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Charlotte Ito, Esq., for Edward Lui, Administrator.

The court and counsel discuss and confirm the Petitioner's prayer.

At the conclusion of discussion, the matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Lopez. Not Reported.

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Aug-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charlotte Ito appeared by zoom for Edward Lui (administrator).
Lauren Peebles appeared by zoom for The Regents of the University of California for UCLA.

The court stated that it read the regents statement of interest and that the petition was left on calendar to see if anyone would appear to object. The Petition to Determine Distribution Rights is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Charlotte Kiyomi Ito appeared via zoom for Edward Lui (administrator).

Discussion was held in regard to the accounting not balancing, that the extraordinary fees will not be addressed until petition for final distribution is reviewed, and that counsel can file an ex parte application or wait for the next accounting. Both matters are taken under submission.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Saephan. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (66 Arleta Ave, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charlotte Ito, via Zoom, for Edward Lui, Personal Representative.

The sale was confirmed at $775,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $775,000 is required.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-06-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated Jan-03-1980 is admitted to probate. Edward Lui, who was appointed as Administrator of the estate on Mar-03-2021, is now appointed Administrator of the estate with will annexed, still with limited authority. Bond will remain at $1,000,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate was previously set and remains set for Sep-06-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
